body_txt: Wrenches are tools often associated with The Engineer , the Gadgeteer Genius , Mr. Fixit , and the Wrench Wench , using them to build and repair objects, whether by tightening bolts or Percussive Maintenance . Like other tools used in construction ( hammers , nailguns , etc.), wrenches can be very effective weapons , even by the Improbable Weapon User . This trope is Truth in Television , as a large wrench made of solid steel is hard and durable enough to inflict severe damage if used as a bludgeon. The monkey wrench or pipe wrench stands out especially for its large mass concentrated on one end, which could easily cave a person’s skull in if swung forcefully. Unrelated to Spanner in the Works , unless what derails your Evil Scheme is underestimating the combat potential of the Wrench Wench . See Crowbar Combatant for another tool used as an effective weapon.
